DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or missing for flights to main base only.

DispatchCondition.Title: Other alternate or equivalent measures applied

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, missing or damaged provided the following alternate safety measures are applied.

ListItem.Para: Use indelible ink or paint to reproduce missing text so that descriptions are fully recovered (pictorial symbols excluded). The condition of the reproduced text or substituted placard/marking must be verified during each terminal or daily check. And/or

Use placards or markings that convey information identical to the original (including text-only versions) until the standard replacements are installed. The condition of the reproduced text or substituted placard/marking must be verified during each terminal or daily check.

For placards relevant to maintenance/ground personnel or crew, the maintenance personnel must brief relevant personnel before work (e.g., fueling/defueling pressure, emergency equipment locations, operating instructions).

OperationProcedure.Para: The pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members on the relevant defective placards.
